steps.title: Spot the contradiction
steps.content: The passage contrasts the poem's superficially traditional form with Al-Malaika's ground-breaking content—these opposing ideas require a transition that acknowledges both.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
Though signals a concession: despite the traditional form, the poem breaks new ground.

The other three either suggest the wrong logical relationship, add emphasis without recognizing the contradiction, or continue in the same direction instead of signaling a turn.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
